reforms.description: The Austrian government implemented a higher tax allowance for research and development to enhance the attractiveness of the country as a business location and promote innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The tax allowance incentivizes private sector investment in R&D, which is crucial for innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been put into effect and is currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, the reform is an adjustment to existing tax policy rather than a structural overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: Higher tax allowance for research and development.

reforms.description: The government has embarked on a reform programme aimed at raising the quality of tertiary education and the efficiency of university funding, including the introduction of performance-related elements into the remuneration system for teachers and the funding of universities, alongside legislation to reform the university system with study fees and performance-related funding.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving tertiary education quality and funding efficiency is essential for developing a skilled workforce that can drive innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been enacted and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of the university system, impacting funding and educational quality.
reforms.source_quote: The government has embarked on a reform programme aiming at raising the quality of tertiary education and the efficiency of university funding.

reforms.description: The Austrian government is preparing legislation to increase immigration of skilled workers to address labor shortages in high-demand fields, which is crucial for enhancing the skilled workforce necessary for innovation, alongside considering increased financial incentives for vocational training, particularly for small and medium-sized enterprises.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Addressing labor shortages and enhancing vocational training will improve the skills of the workforce, fostering innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has indicated plans for these reforms but they have not yet been legislated.
reforms.importance_rationale: While important for workforce development, these measures are not as transformative as major reforms.
reforms.source_quote: The government is considering to increase financial incentives for training along with adaptations in legal framework conditions.

reforms.description: Measures have been introduced to improve the framework for promoting entrepreneurship, including the abolition of fees for Chamber of Commerce membership and tax exemptions for new enterprise founders, alongside liberalizing regulations governing the establishment of new enterprises to reduce costs and barriers for SMEs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These measures lower barriers to entry for new businesses, fostering entrepreneurship and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms have been enacted and are currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: While beneficial for startups, these reforms are adjustments rather than major structural changes.
reforms.source_quote: Some progress has been made in introducing measures to improve the framework for promoting entrepreneurship.

reforms.description: A technology package is being implemented to raise the level of R&D, promote clusters in basic research, and subsidize the employment of scientists in industry, alongside introducing new instruments to increase the share of renewable energy sources, particularly biomass, in response to the forthcoming liberalisation of energy markets.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This package aims to enhance R&D capabilities and promote sustainable energy, both of which are critical for long-term economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms have been enacted and are currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The integration of R&D with renewable energy initiatives represents a significant policy shift.
reforms.source_quote: A technology package being implemented which seeks to raise the level of R&D. Clusters to be promoted in basic research and employment of scientists in industry subsidised.

reforms.description: The Austrian government has committed substantial financial resources to expand railway services, particularly long-distance, as part of a strategy to promote environmentally sustainable transport and reduce operating losses.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in sustainable transport infrastructure supports economic growth and environmental goals.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative has been enacted and is currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant investment in infrastructure with broad implications for sustainability and transport efficiency.
reforms.source_quote: Since 1990, about €6.5-7.3 billion has been committed to expand railway services (particularly long-distance) and mainly channelled into investments.

reforms.description: The Austrian strategy to improve thermal efficiency in housing includes stricter building standards and subsidies for thermal efficiency investments, aiming to reduce CO emissions significantly.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving thermal efficiency contributes to environmental sustainability and can stimulate economic activity in the construction sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy has been enacted and is currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: This strategy represents a significant policy initiative aimed at addressing climate change and energy efficiency.
reforms.source_quote: The strategy to improve the thermal efficiency of the housing stock is pursued through stricter building standards for new construction of buildings and subsidies for thermal efficiency investment.

reforms.description: The introduction of a tuition fee for university students takes effect, with proceeds partially allocated to universities for investment purposes.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Allocating tuition fees to universities for investment purposes can enhance research infrastructure and educational quality.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been put into effect and is currently operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: While it contributes to university funding, it is a minor adjustment rather than a major reform.
reforms.source_quote: The introduction of a tuition fee for university students takes effect with the beginning of the winter semester 2001/02; its proceeds will partly be distributed to the universities for investment purposes.
